title: Property Consultant - Phoenix Mills - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Phoenix Mills - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Phoenix Mills in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
